public static Task<EntityColumnData> BuildReadOnlyColumnDataAsync(
	this IEntity e,
	string columnName,
	ISession session,
	CancellationToken ct = null
)

Parameters

e
Type: IEntity
columnName
Type: SystemString
session
Type: ISession
ct (Optional)
Type: System.ThreadingCancellationToken

Return Value

Type: TaskEntityColumnData

Usage Note

In Visual Basic and C#, you can call this method as an instance method on any object of type IEntity. When you use instance method syntax to call this method, omit the first parameter. For more information, see Extension Methods (Visual Basic) or Extension Methods (C# Programming Guide).
